lines.speaker: Noterazzo
lines.text: Hey wanna trade? I'll give the best deals you can find.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: How can you afford to give such good deals?

lines.speaker: Noterazzo
lines.text: The general stores in Asgarnia and Misthalin are heavily taxed. It really makes it hard for them to run an effective business. For some reason taxmen don't visit my store.
